creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello, 

I dont know what Brasero is, and what you are trying to tell us. 
A disk cannot be burned, did you download the image from a different 
mirror? Can you burn other CD's and DVD's just fine using the same 
environment? Can you burn other FreeBSD images fine or? 
What burner are you using? 

It's ofcourse rather difficult to guess all these things from 
the only mentioning of you is "here you have my logfile, goodluck". 
So I am hoping that setting this ticket to feedback can get us 
more on the right track, though you need to help us a bit with 
the questions above (as a starter) so that we can do our best. 

Thanks,
